result.stdout:
NuGet Updater is a tool allowing the automatic update of the NuGet packages found in a solution

      --help, -h             Displays this help screen
      --solution, -s=path    The path to the solution or folder to update;
                               defaults to the current folder
      --feed, -f=url|accessToken
                             A NuGet feed to use for the update; a private feed
                               can be specified with the format url|accessToken;
                                can be specified multiple times
      --version, --versions, -v=version
                             The target version to use; latest stable is always
                               considered; can be specified multiple times
      --ignorePackages, --ignore, -i=package
                             A specific package to ignore; can be specified
                               multiple times
      --updatePackages, --update, -u=package
                             A specific package to update; not specifying this
                               will update all packages found; can be specified
                               multiple times
      --packageAuthor, --packageAuthors, -a=authors
                             A comma separated list of authors of the packages
                               to update; used for public packages only
      --outputFile, --of=path
                             The path to a markdown file where the update
                               summary will be written
      --allowDowngrade, -d   Whether package downgrade is allowed
      --useNuGetorg, -n      Whether to use packages from NuGet.org
      --excludePath, -x=VALUE
                             Excludes paths containing the provided value (case
                               insensitive)
      --silent               Suppress all output from NuGet Updater
      --strict               Whether to use versions with only the specified
                               version tag (ie. dev, but not dev.test)
      --dryrun               Runs the updater but doesn't write the updates to
                               files.
      --result, -r=VALUE     The path to the file where the update result
                               should be saved.
      --versionOverrides=VALUE
                             The path to a JSON file to force specifc versions
                               to be used; format should be the same as the
                               result file
      --updateProperties=VALUE
                             The path to a JSON file that lists pairs of csproj
                               property names and corresponding package Id, so
                               that updater can update project properties as
                               necessary
